mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, real_name, phone, email, union_id, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, real_name, phone, email, union_id, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{unionId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_user set nickname = #{nickname}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, union_id = #{unionId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from sys_user where id in
#{item}

select from sys_user
and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role ur inner join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = sys_user.id and r.role_code = #{roleCode} )
order by id desc
mapper.update: update sys_user set union_id = #{unionId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_user set password = #{password}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select r.* from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.id desc

select distinct p.* from sys_permission p inner join sys_role_permission rp on rp.permission_id = p.id inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rp.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by p.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) values
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, now())
mapper.select: select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId} order by role_id asc
